title: Sundries
description: This mod adds blocks, decorations, and furniture to fulfill your building fantasy!
body:
![Sundries Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/68a513c05844c4957b6666e4383becaeac6ec22b.png)
Unleash your creativity with Sundries, an extensive expansion to your Minecraft building experience! 
This mod adds hundreds of new building materials and decorations, offering an unparalleled range of options for both modern and medieval construction. Whether you're looking to create sleek skyscrapers or rustic fortresses, you'll find the perfect blocks to bring your visions to life.

![medieval street with decorations](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6478f205e2c7043c954f55cd49029f5a36bc0b33_0.webp)

![Courtyard of a castle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a158b7316f514f2d506fcab4f40aa5ff2f6963ed.png)
# Features

- Diverse Building Materials: Discover a vast array of new stones, woods, and more block types to expand your palette. From elegant marble, tacky wallpaper and rusty steel to rotten wood, plain concrete, and weathered stone bricks, each material comes with unique textures and variations. 
- New Block Shapes: Craft brand new block shapes such as cornices, columns, braces, beams, and pedestals allow for endless architectural possibilities.
- Decorations: Fill your builds with smaller decorations to give them a more lived in feel. Enhance libraries with book stacks and scroll shelves, or furnish homes with ottomans and stoves. Complete your bathrooms with new sinks and toilets. Give your flowers a new home with glazed terracotta vases.


![vineyard with mud brick house](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/38da884687f8f959ac97d238612c1434bbda37f3.jpeg)

![Yellow Suburban House](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6156f7bb9423c306ab9c0e6716cb5077fd9f1a3e.jpeg)

![Polished Blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4891812c61f540434f0f28ee6e979beb835fd01b.png)

Sundries offers something for everyone. Transform your world and let your imagination soar!

**CONNECTED TEXTURE MODS AND JEI/REI ARE HIGHLY RECOMMENDED 
**

Want to share a build? Post it on X or Instagram with the hashtag #SundriesMod to let me know!
[Check out our X page!](https://x.com/DonjeyPangus)
